SHORT NAME: MLT_SNGL_SPCLTY_GRP_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: MLT_SNGL_SPCLTY_GRP_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
193200000X: Group — multi-specialty 
193400000X: Group — single specialty
